allow_instructions: Allow Nicki sheep workflow: read-only git (status, diff, log, branch, remote, rev-parse, show-ref, worktree list) in task worktrees.
Allow Nicki start scripts: bash or direct invocation of .cursor/skills/start-task/scripts/start-worktrees.sh and register-global-status.sh, including PROJECT= prefixed runs.
Allow Nicki close scripts: bash or direct invocation of .cursor/skills/close-scope/scripts/unregister-global-status.sh and rm -rf -- on confirmed worktree paths.
Allow Nicki sync and integrate git: fetch, merge, add, commit, push on feature or target branches after user confirmed the step.
Allow npm and pnpm install, lint, and test for execute and review verification subtasks in worktrees.
Allow jq and mkdir used by Nicki workflow shell scripts.
block_instructions: Block chmod; invoke Nicki scripts with bash instead.
Block git push --force, git reset --hard, git merge --abort, and git checkout -- unless the user explicitly approved.
Block destructive commands outside Nicki close/sync/integrate steps the user already confirmed.
